h1: General Construction Services in South Tampa, FL
intro: Professional general contracting services for residential and commercial projects in South Tampa, FL. Titan Homes Group — FL Licensed #CBC1264713, fully bonded and insured.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group provides comprehensive general contracting services for residential and commercial clients throughout South Tampa, FL. As a licensed Florida General Contractor (License #CBC1264713), our team manages all trades, coordinates subcontractors, and ensures every project in South Tampa is completed on time, within budget, and to code.

Our South Tampa general construction services are ideal for clients who need a reliable, experienced contractor to manage complex projects. This includes commercial tenant improvements, retail and office build-outs, structural repairs, multi-family residential projects, and large-scale residential renovations that require professional general contractor oversight.

What makes Titan Homes Group the preferred general contractor for South Tampa clients is our open-book approach to budgeting, our detailed project scheduling, and our commitment to clear communication throughout every phase of construction. With 10+ years of experience and a BBB Accredited status, we are a trusted partner for South Tampa businesses and homeowners alike.

Our team of 20+ full-time professionals — including experienced project managers, skilled carpenters, licensed plumbers, and licensed electricians — brings the depth and expertise necessary to deliver any project in South Tampa to the highest standards.

faqs.question: Are you licensed for commercial construction in South Tampa, FL?
faqs.answer: Yes. Titan Homes Group holds Florida General Contractor License #CBC1264713 and is fully licensed, bonded, and insured for both commercial and residential construction projects in South Tampa and throughout Tampa Bay.

faqs.question: How do you manage subcontractors on projects in South Tampa?
faqs.answer: As your general contractor in South Tampa, we manage and coordinate all subcontractors — plumbers, electricians, HVAC technicians, framing crews, and specialty trades. You have a single point of accountability throughout the project.
